response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of full-stack experience, including recent hands-on TypeScript/Node.js product work and directly relevant AI-agent infrastructure experience (MCP code generators and agentic tooling frameworks) at his current role. He shows strong testing and craftsmanship culture (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, authored test libraries, taught testing courses), plus cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) and both SQL and NoSQL databases. Gaps are stack-specific rather than fundamental: no Nest.js, no explicit Vitest/Jest/Playwright mention, and Kotlin/Python are absent with only light Java exposure.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React product work
Direct AI-agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks)
Strong testing and software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test tooling, community teaching)
concerns: No Nest.js experience mentioned anywhere on the resume
Named testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not explicitly listed; test tooling depth is mostly in DLang
Kotlin and Python missing; Java exposure appears limited and dated

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and named JS testing frameworks
